title: Pan-Seared Cod with Spices
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make cod dish seasoned with a blend of aromatic spices, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Rinse the cod fillets and pat them dry with a paper towel.
Season the cod with ground black pepper and nutmeg.
Heat the olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add the cod fillets to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, until cooked through.
Serve the cod hot, garnished with chopped parsley if desired.
Serve with a side of stir-fried vegetables or a salad for a well-rounded meal.
